name: Apple Coffee Cake or Cinnamon Monkey Bread:
recipeInstructions:
------------------------
FOR THE CINNAMON MONKEY BREAD
---------------------------------
1/2 cup (melted) Butter
1 cup Sugar
1 1/2 tsp Cinnamon
1 cup Finely Chopped Nuts
1/2 cup Raisins or Craisins)
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Mix all ingredients for the batter in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Divide the dough into small balls, just smaller than an egg.
4. Dip each ball into melted butter and then into the sugar mixture (combine sugar, cinnamon, chopped nuts, and raisins or craisins).
5. Place the coated dough balls into a greased tube pan or loaf pan.
6. Cover with a towel and let rise in a draft-free area for 30 to 40 minutes.
7. Bake in the pre-heated oven at 375°F for 45 minutes.
I hope this is of some help to you. Lee Croton-on-Hudson, NY
POSTED on Prodigy on 12/11/93 and formatted by Elaine Radis; BGMB90B on Prodigy and E.RADIS on GEnie.
